turns.name: brush-teeth preview
turns.text: Help me brush my teeth at 8 am and 9 pm every day.
turns.responseText: I can help you set up those daily reminders to brush your teeth at 8 am and 9 pm. Since this is a recurring habit, I'll get that organized for you right away.

parameters.promptInstructions: Remind the user to brush their teeth.
parameters.reason: User requested a daily reminder to brush teeth at 8am and 9pm.

data.message: Trigger is missing "kind" (once | cron | interval | relative_to_anchor | during_window | event | manual | after_task).

result.text: Trigger is missing "kind" (once | cron | interval | relative_to_anchor | during_window | event | manual | after_task).
